methods.description: A one-way analysis of variance (ANOVA) was performed to test the null hypothesis of no difference in quality criteria and essential amino acid content between pollen species.

steps.description: Perform a one-way ANOVA to test the null hypothesis of no difference in quality criteria and essential amino acid content between pollen species.
steps.searchable_summary: perform one-way ANOVA on pollen species data

steps.description: Check assumptions for ANOVA: independent observations, normality of residuals (normal QQ-plot and Shapiro test), and homoscedasticity (Bartlett test).
steps.searchable_summary: validate ANOVA assumptions using Shapiro and Bartlett tests
outputs: p-values for Shapiro and Bartlett tests

steps.description: Perform multiple pairwise comparisons (post-hoc test) when ANOVA is significant. Adjust p-values using Bonferroni's correction.
steps.searchable_summary: conduct post-hoc tests with Bonferroni correction

methods.description: Multivariate analyses were conducted to detect differences between diet compositions using perMANOVA and nMDS ordination.

steps.description: Perform a perMANOVA using Bray-Curtis distances and 999 permutations to detect differences between diet compositions.
Verify multivariate homogeneity of within-group covariance matrices using the 'betadisper' function.
Conduct multiple pairwise comparisons when perMANOVA is significant. Adjust p-values using Bonferroni's correction.
steps.searchable_summary: perform pairwise comparisons with Bonferroni correction

steps.description: Visually assess differences on a non-metric multidimensional scaling (nMDS) ordination using a Bray-Curtis similarity matrix.
steps.searchable_summary: create nMDS ordination plot with Bray-Curtis matrix

steps.description: Perform indicator compound analyses using the 'indval' function to identify compounds indicative of one diet.
steps.searchable_summary: identify indicator compounds with indval function

steps.description: Calculate the Bray-Curtis dissimilarity index to measure deviation of essential pollen amino acid composition from the ideal composition.
steps.searchable_summary: compute Bray-Curtis dissimilarity index for amino acid composition
